title: DuPont Wins Five 2022 R&D 100 Awards
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Aug. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that it has been named winner of five 2022 R&D100 Awards in the Mechanical/Materials category.

title: DuPont Names 2022 Lavoisier and Pedersen Award Medalists
text: Six DuPont scientists and engineers recognized for extraordinary achievements  WILMINGTON, Del. , Aug. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE:DD) today announced it has named six DuPont scientists and engineers as recipients of the company's 2022 Lavoisier Medal for Lifetime Technical Achievement and the prestigious Pedersen Award Medal.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks That Will Survive 2022
text: Buying high-quality blue-chip stocks in a bear market could be a solid path to generating lucrative long-term returns. Blue-chip stocks are typically large-cap businesses in the mature stage of their business cycle.

title: Dupont De Nemours, Inc. (DD) CEO Edward Breen on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Dupont De Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 2, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Chris Mecray - IR Edward Breen - CEO & Executive Chairman Lori Koch - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Scott Davis - Melius Research Charles Tusa - JPMorgan Chase & Co. John McNulty - BMO Capital Markets Vincent Andrews - Morgan Stanley Stephen Byrne - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho Securities David Begleiter - Deutsche Bank Aleksey Yefremov - KeyBanc Capital Markets Michael Sison - Wells Fargo Securities Frank Mitsch - Fermium Research Joshua Spector - UBS John Walsh - Crédit Suisse Prashant Juvekar - Citigroup Operator Good morning, and welcome to DuPont 2Q 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: DuPont de Nemours (DD) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 18.92% and 2.07%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: DuPont Beats Earnings Estimates, and the Stock Rises as Demand Holds
text: DuPont reports adjusted second-quarter earnings of 88 cents a share, beating Wall Street estimates of 75 cents.

title: DuPont stock drops after profit and sales beat expectations but outlook was downbeat
text: Shares of DuPont de Nemours Inc. DD, -1.68% dropped 1.7% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the specialty materials and chemicals company reported second-quarter profit and sales that beat expectations but provided a downbeat third-quarter outlook, citing foreign currency headwinds and unplanned downtime at a Virginia site. Second-quarter net income rose to $787 million, or $1.55 a share, including 85 cents a share from discontinued operations, from $478 million, or 90 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: DuPont quarterly profit jumps 63% on strong electronics demand
text: Industrial materials maker DuPont de Nemours reported a 63% surge in second-quarter profit on Tuesday, bolstered by strong demand for electronics and construction materials.

title: DuPont Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: 2Q22 Net Sales of $3.3 billion, increased 7%; organic sales increased 9% versus year-ago period 2Q22 GAAP Income from continuing operations of $365 million; operating EBITDA of $829 million increased 6% versus year-ago period; consistent operating EBITDA margin on year-over-year and sequential basis 2Q22 GAAP EPS from continuing operations of $0.71; adjusted EPS of $0.88 increased 11% versus year-ago period ~$665 million of capital returned to shareholders during the quarter through $500 million in share repurchases and ~$165 million in dividends Pricing actions continue to fully offset higher inflationary costs from raw materials, logistics and energy WILMINGTON, Del. , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- - DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced financial results(1) for the second quarter of 2022.
